title: Do 3010 fina end
wikitext:
[]: Do 3.0+1.0 finał end?             Quote Post by Roscablada » Thu Sep 05, 2024 10:05 pm Hello, I'm new to neon genesis evangelion. I just finished watching the whole rebulid and I have a question. Is NGE 3.0+1.0 the final end of the story? iIf something is created in the future, will it always be chronologically before 3.0+1.0? I know that Shinji has created a new normal world, without Ners and eva's, but will it all stay as he wished, or is there a chance that history will repeat itself again? Does NGE have a multiverse and is there a world somewhere where humans stopped 3i but eva's still exist? Sorry to bad english.

[]: Re: Do 3.0+1.0 finał end?             Quote Post by dzzthink » Fri Sep 06, 2024 5:52 am Yes, currently the 3.0+1.0 is the final ending of the evangelion series as announced by Anno, with no future projects that continue the story. There isn't a multiverse but there are different versions of the story, as shown by the TV series, end of evangelion movie, manga, and rebuild movie series, and all of these technically end with no evas present in the world.

[]: Re: Do 3.0+1.0 finał end?             Quote Post by Roscablada » Fri Sep 06, 2024 7:45 am dzzthink wrote: Yes, currently the 3.0+1.0 is the final ending of the evangelion series as announced by Anno, with no future projects that continue the story. There isn't a multiverse but there are different versions of the story, as shown by the TV series, end of evangelion movie, manga, and rebuild movie series, and all of these technically end with no evas present in the world.

[]: Re: Do 3.0+1.0 finał end?             Quote Post by Axx°N N. » Fri Sep 06, 2024 12:18 pm Anno has said in interviews that he's open to Eva continuing ala Gundam, with entries made by other people. There's no telling if that will happen or what it will look like in terms of chronology. For a while, the popular notion was that any further material would fill in the time-skip gap between 2.0 and 3.0. This was confirmed when a manga one-shot and a short were made after 3.0+1.0 that did just that and were included on its BD. As for a multiverse, kinda, the ending of the original series alludes to "many possible realities" and one can extend this logic to say that while not all Eva spinoffs are canonical, the Eva story does involve a canonical multiverse. One of the spinoff mangas, for instance, explicitly takes place in the "slice of life" version of Eva glimpsed at in episode 26. Do note this isn't a literal multiverse, though ... its intention in Episode 26, similar to the intention of the "anti-universe" in 3.0+.1.0, is more like a metaphor about possibilities and choices. Rebuild was intended as an "alternate" version, and Anno's own description of Eva's core theme is "a story that repeats," because in the end it's about how to face the world, and that's not a process that ever reaches a definitive conclusion. As for endings all featuring Evas having vanished ... technically there are ruins/remnants of them left behind in EoE and the manga. Also in EoE, instead of Evas being erased from existence like in 3.0+1.0, Yui remains in Unit 01 drifting in space as an "ark" and as proof of existence of humanity.

[]: Re: Do 3.0+1.0 finał end?             Quote Post by Roscablada » Fri Sep 06, 2024 1:13 pm Axx°N N. Thank you for such a detailed answer, I haven't read the manga yet, I want to buy all the volumes at once, so I will read the ending later. Now I understand this universe a little more. Thanks again:)

[]: Re: Do 3.0+1.0 finał end?             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Fri Sep 06, 2024 10:14 pm 3.0+1.0 is intended to be Anno's final Evangelion work, but they intend to expand the franchise and there might already be something in the works. https://wiki.evageeks.org/Theory_and_An ... _franchise

[]: Re: Do 3.0+1.0 finał end?             Quote Post by Cola-09 » Fri Sep 20, 2024 12:26 pm I wouldn't be surprised if he paddled back and did another EVA project, he loves his work. However, it won't be the same, as people like Motomu Kiyokawa sadly passed away.

[]: Re: Do 3.0+1.0 finał end?             Quote Post by ErgoProxy » Tue Dec 03, 2024 2:17 pm Cola-09 wrote: Motomu Kiyokawa
